commit_scope: Admit a compact non-overlapping fourth-arm residual pass cluster: protocol-beliefs, shared-heart, sqlite-read, wav-sense, self-translate-universal, voice-traits, and voiced.

commands: coord claim fourth-residual-pass-cluster "advance fourth-kernel floor from current main by surveying non-overlapping residual pass candidates; avoid real-summary, Android ELF executable, and active BML/Hati lanes"
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh protocol-beliefs shared-heart sqlite-read wav-sense self-translate-universal voice-traits voiced

python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
for i, line in enumerate(Path('docs/system_audit/model_executor_runs.jsonl').read_text().splitlines(), 1):
    json.loads(line)
print('OK jsonl rows', i)
PY
local_validation.notes: Full fourth-arm survey before upstream rebase reported 158 in-manifest rows plus 30 single-pass and 29 multi-pass residual rows still outside the manifest. This ratchet admits seven source-aware focused rows that do not overlap the active real-summary, Android ELF executable, or BML/Hati lanes. Focused validation returned protocol-beliefs=31, shared-heart=31, sqlite-read=31, wav-sense=63, self-translate-universal=15, voice-traits=1023, and voiced=511; fourth-arm-gate returned PASS-4WAY for all seven. After rebasing over the upstream ephemeris and real-source summary floors, full Form validation reports fourth arm: 168 band(s) four-way, 578 ok, and 0 divergent. The metal-plane audit passes Form-native Mach-O/ELF object floors, Android ELF executable shape, lowered JIT residual cluster, and macOS/Android clang oracle receipts.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.
